_comment: Script 57 -- Context Menu Bundle. Runs script 31 (PowerShell Here) and 52 (VS Code folder repair) in one guided flow.

components.title: PowerShell submenu (Open Here + Open as Admin)
components.description: Adds a 'PowerShell' submenu with 'Open Here' and 'Open as Admin' to folder + folder background right-click menus.

components.title: ConEmu submenu (Open Here + Open as Admin)
components.description: Adds a 'ConEmu' submenu with 'Open Here' and 'Open as Admin' to folder + folder background right-click menus.

components.title: Windows Terminal submenu (Open Here + Open as Admin)
components.description: Adds a 'Windows Terminal' submenu with 'Open Here' and 'Open as Admin' to folder + folder background right-click menus.
